text: Can you count from one to ten out loud?
What is two plus three? Tell me how you worked it out.
Can you name three shapes and describe them?
How do you use maths when you go shopping?
What is your favourite number and why?
Can you explain what an even number is?
Tell me the five times table up to fifty.
What is the difference between addition and subtraction?
How would you explain what a fraction is to a friend?
Can you describe what a clock face looks like and how to read it?
What is half of twenty? Tell me how you got the answer.
Can you name three things you can measure and say how you would measure them?
Tell me a maths fact you think is interesting.
How would you work out how much change you get from a ten pound note?
Can you explain what place value means?
What do you find most challenging about maths? Why?
Tell me two numbers that add up to one hundred.
How would you explain what multiplication is to a younger child?
Can you describe what a right angle looks like?
What is a prime number? Can you name two?
How would you explain the difference between area and perimeter?
Can you tell me a number sequence and explain the pattern?
What does percentage mean? Can you give an example?
Tell me how you would divide 20 sweets between 4 friends.
Can you describe what a negative number is?
How do you use maths in your everyday life?
What is the difference between a square and a rectangle?
Can you explain what rounding a number means?
Tell me what a bar chart is and when you might use one.
How would you explain what probability means?
What is your favourite maths topic and why?
Can you name a three dimensional shape and describe it?
Tell me how you would find the area of a rectangle.
What does the equals sign mean in a number sentence?
How would you explain what a decimal number is?
Can you describe what symmetry means and give an example?
Tell me what a factor of a number is.
How would you explain what coordinates are?
What is the most useful maths skill you have learned?
Can you explain what the mean of a set of numbers is?
Tell me about a time maths helped you solve a real problem.
How would you explain what ratio means?
Can you describe what an acute angle and an obtuse angle are?
Tell me what you know about the number pi.
How would you explain algebra to someone who had never heard of it?
Can you explain why knowing times tables is helpful?
What do you find easiest in maths? Tell me about it.
How would you work out the perimeter of a square?
Tell me what you know about Roman numerals.
Can you explain what an isosceles triangle is?
How would you find ten percent of a number?
Tell me what BIDMAS means and why it is important.
Can you explain the difference between a multiple and a factor?
How would you describe what a pie chart shows?
Tell me about a maths game you enjoy playing.
Can you explain what an improper fraction is?
How would you explain long division step by step?
Tell me about a shape that has rotational symmetry.
Can you describe how to convert metres to centimetres?
How would you explain what a line graph shows?
Tell me two things that have a right angle in real life.
Can you explain why estimation is a useful skill?
How would you describe what the square root of a number is?
Tell me about the Fibonacci sequence.
Can you explain what it means to simplify a fraction?
How would you describe what inverse operations are?
Tell me how you would check a multiplication answer using division.
Can you describe what standard form is used for?
How would you explain what tessellation means?
Tell me about a career that uses lots of maths.
Can you explain what a number bond is?
How would you describe adding fractions with different denominators?
Tell me what you know about square numbers.
Can you explain what the gradient of a line tells us?
How would you describe the difference between parallel and perpendicular lines?
Tell me how you would solve the equation 2x = 10.
Can you describe what a frequency table is used for?
How would you explain what a translation means in geometry?
Tell me a real life situation where you might use percentages.
Can you explain what the mode of a set of data is?
How would you describe what volume and capacity mean?
Tell me about a time you made a mistake in maths and how you fixed it.
Can you explain why zero is an important number?
How would you describe the difference between odd and even numbers?
Tell me what the circumference of a circle is.
Can you explain what a coordinate grid looks like?
How would you describe column subtraction step by step?
Tell me about something in nature that follows a mathematical pattern.
Can you explain what an equivalent fraction is?
How would you describe what a net of a 3D shape is?
Tell me what you know about the number line.
Can you explain what currency conversion means?
How would you describe what surface area means?
Tell me about the order of operations in maths.
Can you explain what it means to reflect a shape?
How would you describe what a right angled triangle looks like?
Tell me one interesting fact about prime numbers.
Can you explain how a timetable works?
How would you solve a word problem about buying items in a shop?
Tell me what you would like to learn more about in maths.
